title: After TikTok, Snap settles social media addiction case
summary: TikTok recently settled its portion of the case with the plaintiff ahead of a jury trial that starts next week in Los Angeles. YouTube has also reached a deal, leaving Meta as the only remaining defendant.

title: Can Dell (DELL) Sustain Its AI Server Momentum Without Reshaping Its Risk Profile?
summary: In recent days, Dell Technologies raised its fiscal 2027 revenue guidance and increased its outlook for AI-optimized server sales, reflecting stronger expectations for AI-related infrastructure demand than previously communicated. This guidance shift, supported by robust AI server order trends across competitors like Super Micro, highlights how sector-wide AI investment is increasingly validating Dell’s role in next-generation data center build-outs.
